aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Zigbee Human Presence Sensor**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE204_bvfld3xc`  
   - **Driver:** `presence_sensor_radar`  
   - **Issue:** [#1355](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1355)  
   - **User:** TeejooK  

2. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_8se38w3c`  
   - **Driver:** `climate_sensor`  
   - **Issue:** [#1354](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)  
   - **User:** pemikalsen-sudo  

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**  
  - **Drivers:** `switch_3gang`  
  - **Issue:** [#170](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)  

- **_TZ3000_kxaow5ki**  
  - **Drivers:** `button_wireless_1`  
  - **Issue:** [#167](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/167)  

- **_TZE284_hdml1aav**  
  - **Drivers:** `soil_sensor`  
  - **Issue:** [#176](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/176)  

- **_TZE284_oitavov2**  
  - **Drivers:** `soil_sensor`  
  - **Issue:** [#178](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/178)  

- **_TZ3000_otvn3lne**  
  - **Drivers:** `motion_sensor`  
  - **Issue:** [#164](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/164)  

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- **_TZE204_bvfld3xc**  
  - **Drivers:** `presence_sensor_radar`  
  - **Fork Issue:** [#1355](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1355)  

- **_TZE284_8se38w3c**  
  - **Drivers:** `climate_sensor`  
  - **Fork Issue:** [#1354](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)  

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Add Support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **PR:** [#46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **State:** Closed, not merged  

2. **Add TS110E Driver**  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`  
   - **PR:** [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)  
   - **User:** PiTRiS87  
   - **State:** Open  

3. **Add Support for Tuya PIR Sensor TS0202**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`  
   - **PR:** [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)  
   - **User:** chernals  
   - **State:** Closed, not merged  

4. **Add 3 New Devices**  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **PR:** [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **State:** Open  

5. **Update driver.compose.json**  
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - **PR:** [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **State:** Open  

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting new device requests, existing fingerprint support, and relevant pull requests for integration.
